contracts.description: safeSnippet returns string and never throws

evidence.snippet: export function safeSnippet(value: string, maxLength = MAX_SNIPPET_LENGTH): string { const oneLine = redactSecrets(value).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); return oneLine.length > maxLength ? `${oneLine.slice(0, maxLength - 1)}...` : oneLine; }
evidence.reasoning: Explicit return type is string; no_throw=true
